name: braincity-v3
description: Netlify-deployable BrainCity project atlas — Three.js 3D visualization with City/Neural/State modes

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/shared/dataModel.js && node --check src/shared/signalEngine.js && node --check src/shared/cameraRig.js && node --check src/shared/hud.js && node --check src/renderers/RendererCity.js && node --check src/renderers/RendererNeural.js && node --check src/state/StateEvolutionEngine.js
scripts.validate:json: python -m json.tool data/public/projects.json > /dev/null && python -m json.tool data/public/manifest.json > /dev/null && python -m json.tool data/internal/projects.json > /dev/null && python -m json.tool data/internal/manifest.json > /dev/null && python -m json.tool data/private/projects.json > /dev/null && python -m json.tool data/private/manifest.json > /dev/null && echo 'All JSON files valid'

author: BrainCity Lab
